reviews.comment:
Hace algunos años daba gusto parar ahí.  Hoy mejor ir al lado. La Shell

(Translated by Google)
A few years ago it was nice to stop there. Today it's better to go next door. The Shell

reviews.comment:
Me chamuyaron que pagando con mercado pago se cargaban los puntos automáticamente....para no cargar los puntos...seguramente se lo quedara el playero.

(Translated by Google)
They told me that paying with Mercado Pago would automatically add points... so to avoid adding points... the gas station attendant will probably keep them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQMUpIT3lRRRAB

I love this place. The bathrooms are great.

reviews.comment:
El playero mas lento de mi vida
Se preocupaba por lavar parabtisa para la propina y descuidaba los surtidores
Media hora para cargar

(Translated by Google)
The slowest gas station attendant I've ever had. He was too busy washing windshields for tips and neglecting the pumps. Half an hour to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQcEs3NDZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No es YPF full lo cual no te dan descuentos. Cierran el almacén de 00 a 06:30 en cuanto a sus competidores de al lado están 24 hs abierto

(Translated by Google)
It's not a full YPF store, so you don't get discounts. The store is closed from midnight to 6:30 a.m., while its competitors next door are open 24 hours a day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQzdFpIaXZBRRAB
